input: I failed a quiz and I feel like I am falling behind everyone else
I had a good day for once and I just wanted to tell someone
I am nervous about my exam tomorrow, but I mostly need a little reassurance
I am mad at my roommate and I need to vent before I say something mean
I feel lonely tonight and I do not want to be alone with it
I finally finished the assignment I was avoiding, and I feel relieved
Can you help me think through what to say to my friend after our argument?
I feel overwhelmed by my schedule and I need one small next step
I do not need advice, I just need someone to sit with this sadness for a minute
Please do not tell me to make a gratitude list; I already tried that and it made me feel worse
Can you stop asking me to breathe and just acknowledge that this week has been awful?
I know I should be happy about getting accepted, but I mostly feel scared and undeserving
Everyone keeps telling me it could be worse, and I feel guilty for still being upset
Do not give me a list of solutions. I want to understand why I feel so reactive today
I am safe, but I had a scary intrusive thought and now I feel ashamed
My friend is struggling and I feel responsible for fixing everything
I want you to be direct: was I wrong to cancel plans because I felt overwhelmed?
I am spiraling, but I do not want a lecture or a crisis script
I feel numb after something good happened, which makes no sense to me
I keep comparing myself to people online and then I hate how behind I am
I feel embarrassed because I cried in front of my manager today
Can you talk to me like a friend and not make it sound like a worksheet?
I need help calming down before my presentation, but please keep it simple
I am proud of myself, but I am worried saying that makes me sound arrogant
I am so angry that I want to send a message I will regret
I do not want to talk about feelings; can you help me figure out the next practical step?
I am tired of being told to just think positive
I feel like I am too much for my friends, but I am not in danger
My parents say I am dramatic, and now I cannot tell if my feelings are real
I got rejected and I need someone to not immediately turn it into a lesson
